message:
fix: stale --cleanup now performs full nuke sequence (gt-pnygi)

Extract per-polecat nuke logic into nukePolecatFull helper that both
`polecat nuke` and `polecat stale --cleanup` now call. The stale cleanup
was previously only calling mgr.RemoveWithOptions, skipping tmux session
kill, branch deletion, agent bead close, and orphaned process cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
